title: Silk Amethyst
description: This plugin allows players to mine budding Amethysts using any item with silk touch! Works on 1.18 +
body:
## FEATURES

✅ Easy Setup
✅ Light-Weight
✅ Easy to Install
✅ Permission Based​

## PERMISSIONS

amethyst.break


## INSTALLATION
- Place SilkAmethyst.jar into your plugins folder​
- Add amethyst.break to the permissions​
- Restart/Reload your server!
